name: main
docstring: rekipedia — agentic repo-to-wiki knowledge store.

name: _check_rag_deps
docstring: Raise a friendly error if faiss-cpu / numpy are not installed.

name: embed_cmd
signature: embed_cmd(repo_path, output_dir, model, provider, api_key, base_url, top_k, verbose)
docstring: Build or refresh the RAG embed index for REPO_PATH.

name: _get_store
docstring: Resolve the store from context or CWD.

name: note_cmd
docstring: Manage tech lead notes.

name: note_add
docstring: Add a new tech lead note.

name: note_list
docstring: List tech lead notes.

name: note_remove
docstring: Remove a note by ID (or ID prefix).

name: note_edit
docstring: Edit a note. Opens $EDITOR if --content not provided.

name: note_import
docstring: Import notes from a YAML or Markdown file.

name: import_notes_from_file
docstring: Parse a YAML or Markdown file and return list of note dicts.

name: _import_markdown
docstring: Parse markdown: each ## Section becomes a note.

name: _verify_scan
docstring: Return the latest successful run_id, or raise RuntimeError.

name: _rag_chunks
docstring: Return top-k RAG chunks, or [] if index not available.

name: _extract_keywords
docstring: Extract meaningful keywords from a query (simple stopword filter).

name: _score_page
docstring: Score a wiki page against query keywords using TF + importance boost.

name: _rank_pages_by_query
docstring: Rank wiki pages by relevance to the query.

name: _rewrite_query
docstring:
Silently rewrite query to match codebase vocabulary.

Returns rewritten query or original if rewrite fails/disabled.

name: _build_full_system
docstring: Assemble the system prompt + all context sources.

name: run_ask
docstring:
Answer *question* grounded in the knowledge store.

Args:
    question: Free-text question from the user.
    repo_root: Absolute path to the repository.
    output_dir: `.rekipedia/` directory containing store.db + wiki/.
    llm_config: LLM settings; defaults to LLMConfig().
    history: Previous conversation turns as [{role, content}, ...].

Returns:
    The assistant's answer as a Markdown string.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If no successful scan exists for the repo.

name: stream_ask
docstring:
Answer *question* grounded in the knowledge store, streaming tokens.

Identical to :func:`run_ask` except the final LLM call uses streaming
and yields text chunks instead of returning a single string.

name: run_digest
docstring:
Full scan pipeline.

Args:
    repo_root: Absolute path to the repository to scan.
    output_dir: `.rekipedia/` directory; DB + wiki output goes here.
    llm_config: LLM settings; defaults to LLMConfig() which uses ollama/llama4.
    force_local: Skip Docker even if available.
    verbose: Enable debug logging (litellm, HTTP, stack traces).
    progress: Optional callback that receives status strings for display.
    languages: Optional list of language names to include (e.g. ["python"]).
    no_llm: Skip LLM enrichment for refactoring issues (static analysis only).
    stdout_refactor: When True, also print REFACTOR.md to stdout after writing.

name: run_update
docstring:
Incremental update pipeline.

Re-extracts only files whose SHA-256 has changed since the last
successful scan, then re-synthesises wiki pages with the full
combined symbol index.

Args:
    repo_root: Absolute path to the repository to scan.
    output_dir: `.rekipedia/` directory; DB + wiki output goes here.
    llm_config: LLM settings; defaults to LLMConfig().
    force_local: Skip Docker even if available.
    progress: Optional callback that receives status strings for display.

name: _mmr
docstring:
Maximal Marginal Relevance — diversify top-K results.

Iteratively picks the candidate that maximises:
    lambda * sim(query, c) - (1-lambda) * max(sim(c, selected))

name: _is_implementation
docstring:
Heuristic: True for core logic files, False for tests/configs.
Borrowed from deepwiki-open's data_pipeline.py.

name: _iter_repo_files
docstring: Walk repo, yielding files eligible for embedding.

name: _chunk_file
docstring: Split file into overlapping text chunks with metadata including line provenance.

name: _symbol_chunk_file
docstring:
Chunk a source file along AST symbol boundaries (functions, classes, methods).

Falls back to character-based chunking if:
- tree-sitter is not installed
- the language is not supported
- the file has no recognizable symbols
- any tree-sitter error occurs

Returns same dict format as _chunk_file() — fully compatible.

name: _symbol_chunk_file_inner
docstring: Inner implementation — raises on error so caller can fall back.

name: _embed_batch
docstring:
Call embedding API and return (N, D) float32 array.

Always uses litellm.embedding().  When a custom base_url is configured
(e.g. a LiteLLM proxy), it is passed as ``api_base`` so litellm routes
directly to that endpoint without overriding the model prefix.

name: EmbedPipeline
docstring: Build and query a FAISS index over a repository's source files.

name: EmbedPipeline.build
docstring:
Chunk all eligible files, embed, save FAISS index + chunks.json.

Returns number of chunks embedded.

name: EmbedPipeline.search
docstring:
Return top-k most relevant chunks for *query*.

Each result dict has: file, chunk_idx, text, score, is_implementation.
Returns [] if no index exists.

Args:
    query: The search query.
    top_k: Number of results to return.
    mmr: If True (default), apply Maximal Marginal Relevance to diversify results.
         Respects REKIPEDIA_RAG_MMR=0 env var to disable.

name: EmbedPipeline.update
signature: update(self, repo_root, changed_files, last_run_id, new_run_id, progress_cb)
docstring:
Incrementally update the RAG index — only re-embed chunks from changed files.

Returns number of chunks re-embedded (not total chunks).
Falls back to full build() if no existing index found.

name: create_app
docstring: Factory — returns a configured FastAPI app.

name: SqliteStore
docstring:
Wraps a database connection for the rekipedia store.

Uses Turso (pyturso) when available; falls back to stdlib sqlite3.
Usage::

    store = SqliteStore(Path(".rekipedia/store.db"))
    store.open()
    # … use store methods …
    store.close()

Also usable as a context manager::

    with SqliteStore(path) as store:
        store.upsert_run(run_id, repo_path)

name: SqliteStore.db
docstring: Raw Turso connection. Prefer the typed helper methods over direct access.

name: SqliteStore.table_names
docstring: Return names of all user tables in the database.

name: SqliteStore.upsert_file
signature: upsert_file(self, run_id, path, sha256, size_bytes, language)

name: SqliteStore.upsert_page
signature: upsert_page(self, run_id, slug, title, content, pinned)

name: SqliteStore.get_relationships_for_run
docstring: Return all scan_relationships rows for *run_id* as plain dicts.

name: SqliteStore.get_god_nodes
docstring: Return top_n god nodes (symbol name, degree) for the given run.

name: SqliteStore.get_latest_run_id
docstring: Return the id of the last successful scan_run for *repo_path*, or None.

name: SqliteStore.get_files_for_run
docstring: Return all scan_files rows for *run_id* as plain dicts.

name: SqliteStore.copy_unchanged_symbols
docstring:
Copy symbols from *from_run_id* to *to_run_id*, skipping *exclude_paths*.

Returns the number of rows copied.

name: SqliteStore.copy_unchanged_relationships
docstring: Copy relationships from *from_run_id* to *to_run_id*, skipping *exclude_paths*.

name: SqliteStore.upsert_page_sources
docstring: Record which source files contributed to *page_slug* in *run_id*.

name: SqliteStore.get_pages_for_files
docstring: Return set of page slugs whose sources include any of *file_paths* in *run_id*.

name: SqliteStore.get_all_page_slugs
docstring: Return all page slugs stored for *run_id*.

name: SqliteStore.carry_forward_page_sources
docstring: Copy page_sources entries from *from_run_id* to *to_run_id* for *page_slugs*.

name: SqliteStore.copy_pages
docstring: Copy wiki pages from *from_run_id* to *to_run_id* for *page_slugs*.

name: SqliteStore.save_qa
docstring: Persist a Q&A pair. Returns the new row id.

name: SqliteStore.get_qa_history
docstring: Return recent Q&A pairs for a repo, newest first.

name: SqliteStore.upsert_note
docstring: Insert or update a tech lead note. Returns the note id.

name: SqliteStore.list_notes
docstring: Return all notes, optionally filtered by a tag.

name: SqliteStore.delete_note
docstring: Delete a note by id. Returns True if deleted.

name: SqliteStore.get_note
docstring: Fetch a single note by id.

name: SqliteStore.upsert_rag_chunks
docstring:
Persist RAG chunk provenance records for *run_id*.

Each dict must have: file_path, chunk_idx, start_line, end_line,
start_char, end_char, text_hash, is_code, is_implementation.

name: SqliteStore.get_rag_chunks_by_file
docstring: Return all RAG chunk provenance records for *file_path* in *run_id*.

name: SqliteStore.carry_forward_rag_chunks
docstring:
Copy RAG chunk provenance from *from_run_id* to *to_run_id* for *file_paths*.

Used by incremental embed: unchanged files keep their provenance records.
Returns number of rows copied.

name: SqliteStore.get_all_rag_chunks
docstring: Return all RAG chunk provenance records for *run_id*.

name: test_notes_injected_in_context
docstring: Notes should appear in assembled system context.

name: test_notes_not_injected_when_empty
docstring: If no notes, context should not have the notes section.

name: _fake_embed_response
docstring: Return a fake litellm embedding response dict-like.

name: _make_test_repo
docstring: Create a minimal repo with a few source files.

name: test_chunk_file_includes_line_provenance
docstring: _chunk_file should include start_line, end_line, text_hash in each chunk.

name: test_sqlite_store_upsert_and_get_rag_chunks
docstring: upsert_rag_chunks + get_rag_chunks_by_file round-trip.

name: test_embed_pipeline_persists_provenance
docstring: EmbedPipeline.build() should call upsert_rag_chunks when store is provided.

name: test_embed_pipeline_update_skips_unchanged_files
docstring: update() should only re-embed chunks from changed files.

name: test_embed_pipeline_update_falls_back_to_build_if_no_index
docstring: update() should fall back to build() if no existing index found.

name: test_symbol_chunk_file_python_basic
docstring: Symbol chunker should produce chunks for a Python file with functions.

name: test_symbol_chunk_file_fallback_for_unsupported_ext
docstring: Symbol chunker should fall back to char-based for unsupported file types.

name: test_symbol_chunk_file_fallback_on_tssitter_missing
docstring: Symbol chunker should fall back gracefully if tree-sitter is not installed.

name: test_symbol_chunk_file_large_function_splits
docstring: A single very large function should be split into multiple chunks.

name: test_update_no_prior_scan_falls_back_to_full
docstring: If no previous scan exists, run_update() falls back to run_digest().

name: test_update_no_changes_exits_early
docstring: If nothing has changed, update exits early without re-calling the LLM.

name: test_update_on_changed_file_creates_new_run
docstring: When a file changes, run_update creates a new run entry in scan_runs.

name: test_update_carries_forward_symbols_from_unchanged_files
docstring: Symbols from unchanged files are present in the new run without re-extraction.

name: test_update_wiki_pages_refreshed_after_change
docstring: After an update the wiki pages should still exist and be 5 in number.

name: test_targeted_wiki_resynthesis_only_affected_pages
docstring: reki update should only re-synthesise pages whose source files changed (issue #77).

name: test_page_sources_upsert_and_query
docstring: SqliteStore page_sources methods work correctly (issue #77).

name: test_get_all_page_slugs
docstring: get_all_page_slugs returns slugs for a run.

name: test_update_triggers_incremental_rag_embed_when_index_exists
docstring: run_update() should call EmbedPipeline.update() when index exists.
